description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Bilder Uploader 1.3 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the config[root_ordner] parameter to (1) gruppen.php, (2) bild.php, (3) feed.php, (4) mitglieder.php, (5) online.php, (6) profil.php, and possibly other unspecified PHP scripts.
